    "Unauthorized on-site water addition to concrete mix (slump manipulation) without engineering approval or verification of water-cement ratio limits."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the concrete placement immediately.",
    "Verify the maximum allowable water addition from the delivery ticket and mix design.",
    "Measure the slump and document the exact amount of water added.",
    "Reject the batch if the maximum water-cement ratio or design slump is exceeded."
  ],
  "rationale": "Adding water on site without strict adherence to the mix design limits and ACI guidelines compromises the compressive strength, durability, and permeability of the concrete, leading to structural non-compliance.",

    "ACI 301 (Specifications for Structural Concrete)",
